methodology.split: single grouped 80/20 holdout by group_id with group-label stratification
methodology.normalization: train-only hierarchical z-scoring with fallback by grouping levels
methodology.feature_selection: ANOVA f_classif fit on training data only
methodology.imputation: median imputation with explicit missingness indicators
methodology.importance_primary: held-out permutation importance on the fitted best model using original selected input columns
methodology.importance_secondary: native coefficients or impurity importances on the transformed post-imputation design matrix when available
